description_long: This is a modern rectangular sink unit featuring a white ceramic basin mounted atop a dark wood-finished cabinet. The basin has rounded corners and a smooth, glossy surface, with a single faucet and a visible drain hole. The faucet is cylindrical and positioned at the rear center of the basin, with a matching handle. The cabinet below is boxy, with a rich wood grain texture and appears to have a front panel that may function as a drawer or storage compartment. The rear view reveals mounting hardware and an open section beneath the basin for plumbing access. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban bathrooms or public washrooms.
description: A modern white ceramic sink with a rounded rectangular basin sits atop a dark wood-finished cabinet, featuring a central faucet and a sleek, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the white basin and the wood cabinet, with the faucet and handle visible at the rear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, flat face of the wood cabinet and the full shape of the basin with the faucet centered at the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the basin's profile and faucet placement.
description_view_3: Rear view exposing the mounting hardware, open plumbing area, and the back of the basin and cabinet.
